assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 1-4: YAML frontmatter delimited by --- with name: nextjs-cdk-deploy and a description field present.

assertion_results.text: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning Next.js and deployment
assertion_results.evidence: Description contains literal 'Use when deploying Next.js apps to AWS, setting up CDK infrastructure for Next.js, creating deployment pipelines...'.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains a multi-step numbered deployment workflow
assertion_results.evidence: Eight numbered steps: '### 1. Validate prerequisites' through '### 8. Post-deployment verification' covering the full deployment pipeline.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments
assertion_results.evidence: Extensive coverage: '### 5. Deploy to staging', '### 6. Manual approval gate', '### 7. Deploy to production', environment config table (line 72-81), and staging->production pipeline throughout.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures with specific steps
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 195-241: '## Rollback procedures' with three options: Option A (CDK rollback with bun run scripts/deploy.ts --rollback), Option B (CloudFront failover with invalidation command), Option C (DNS failover). Each has numbered steps.

assertion_results.text: A scripts/ directory exists with at least 2 deployment-related scripts
assertion_results.evidence: Two scripts: scripts/deploy.ts (427 lines, handles deploy and rollback) and scripts/preflight-check.ts (466 lines, handles prerequisite validation and deployment verification).

assertion_results.text: The scripts use Bun TypeScript (.ts files) as the preferred runtime
assertion_results.evidence: Both scripts are .ts files with #!/usr/bin/env bun shebang: deploy.ts (line 1) and preflight-check.ts (line 1).

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertion_results.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids 1, 2, 3) covering full deployment walkthrough, emergency rollback, and environment config setup.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 256: '## Common mistakes' section with an 8-row table covering skipping staging, missing standalone output, deploying all stacks, skipping cdk diff, etc.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertion_results.evidence: SKILL.md is 299 lines total, well under the 500-line limit.
